name: African Vegetarian Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 small Kohlrabies, peeled and cut into chunks
2 Sweet Potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks
15 ounces garbanzo beans with liquid included
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and let simmer until the vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Serve the couscous separately if desired.
4. Parsnips can be substituted for the kohlrabi.
